basic_details.job_title: ISI Statistical Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Statistical Institute (ISI) has officially announced the Statistical Trainee Recruitment 2026 with 3 openings. The detailed notification was published under Advertisement No. No.PU/507/ADV/456 on the official ISI website. Candidates up to 30 years of age with a Master’s degree in Statistics and experience in Statistical Programming or software such as R or SPSS can submit their applications via email on or before 30-06-2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years as on 30-06-2026. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules for SC/ST/OBC/Women/Differently abled and extraordinary candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Statistics with experience in Statistical Programming/ Statistical Software e.g. R and or SPSS etc.
qualification.details: Master's degree in Statistics with experience in Statistical Programming/ Statistical Software e.g. R and or SPSS etc. Only fresh post graduates who are completing their M.Sc. in 2026 or awaiting result are eligible to apply but if selected, their appointment will be allowed only after successful completion of the M.Sc. degree (along with fulfilment of all other desired criteria).

selection_process: Written Test (if required) Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ISI Statistical Trainee Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download ISI Statistical Trainee Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ISI Statistical Trainee recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Statistical Trainee position at the Indian Statistical Institute is June 30, 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Statistical Trainee post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Statistics and have experience in statistical programming or software like R or SPSS.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Statistical Trainee position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Statistical Trainee post is 30 years as of June 30, 2026. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. How are the candidates selected for the Statistical Trainee role?
faq.answer: The selection process may include a written test, followed by an interview and document verification. The written test is conducted only if deemed necessary.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Statistical Trainee position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 25,000.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates applying for the Statistical Trainee position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for the ISI Statistical Trainee recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted via email to the address specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Can fresh post-graduates apply for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, fresh post-graduates completing their M.Sc. in 2026 or awaiting results are eligible, provided they successfully complete their degree upon selection.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Indian Statistical Institute located?
faq.answer: The Indian Statistical Institute is located in Kolkata, West Bengal, with the pincode 700108.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The position of Statistical Trainee is on a contractual basis.
